Class SearchEngine

    • SearchEngine

      public SearchEngine(StreamingDatabase db)

  • Method Details

    • findUsersByRegistrationDateRange

      public Iterable<User> findUsersByRegistrationDateRange(String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds users registered within a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - beginning of registration period (YYYY-MM-DD)
      endDate - end of registration period (YYYY-MM-DD)
      Returns:
      users registered in this range

    • findArtistsByBirthDateRange

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByBirthDateRange(String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds artists born within a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - beginning of birth period (YYYY-MM-DD)
      endDate - end of birth period (YYYY-MM-DD)
      Returns:
      artists born in this range

    • findArtistsByNationality

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByNationality(String nationality)
      Finds artists by their nationality using Hash Table.
      Parameters:
      nationality - country name to filter by
      Returns:
      artists from the specified nation

    • findContentsByNamePrefix

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByNamePrefix(String prefix)
      Performs a prefix search on content names using Lexicographical BST bounds.
      Parameters:
      prefix - starting characters of content title
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByReleaseDateRange

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByReleaseDateRange(String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds content released within a specific date range.
      Parameters:
      startDate - beginning of release range (YYYY-MM-DD)
      endDate - end of release range (YYYY-MM-DD)
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findUsersByRegion

      public Iterable<User> findUsersByRegion(String region)
      Finds all users from a given region.
      Parameters:
      region - geographical region code or name
      Returns:
      list of users in this region

    • findUsersByRegionAndDateRange

      public Iterable<User> findUsersByRegionAndDateRange(String region, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds all users from a given region and registration date range.
      Parameters:
      region - geographical region code or name
      startDate - starting registration date limit
      endDate - ending registration date limit
      Returns:
      matching users list

    • findUsersByNameSubstring

      public Iterable<User> findUsersByNameSubstring(String substring)
      Finds users by a name substring.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment to search for
      Returns:
      matching users list

    • findUsersByNameAndRegionAndDate

      public Iterable<User> findUsersByNameAndRegionAndDate(String substring, String region, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds users by name substring, region, and registration date range.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment to filter by
      region - geographical region code or name
      startDate - starting registration date
      endDate - ending registration date
      Returns:
      matching users list

    • findArtistsByGender

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByGender(String gender)
      Finds artists by gender.
      Parameters:
      gender - gender string (e.g. Male, Female)
      Returns:
      matching artists list

    • findArtistsByNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDateRange

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDateRange(String nationality, String gender, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds artists by nationality, gender, and birth date range.
      Parameters:
      nationality - artist's country name
      gender - gender keyword
      startDate - starting birth date limit
      endDate - ending birth date limit
      Returns:
      matching artists list

    • findArtistsByNameSubstring

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByNameSubstring(String substring)
      Finds artists by name substring.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment to search for
      Returns:
      matching artists list

    • findArtistsByNameAndNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDate

      public Iterable<Artist> findArtistsByNameAndNationalityAndGenderAndBirthDate(String substring, String nationality, String gender, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds artists by name substring, nationality, gender, and birth date range.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment to filter by
      nationality - artist's country name
      gender - gender keyword
      startDate - starting birth date
      endDate - ending birth date
      Returns:
      matching artists list

    • findContentsByType

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByType(ContentType type)
      Finds contents by type.
      Parameters:
      type - content type constant (e.g. MOVIE, SERIES)
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByTypeAndGenreAndDateRange

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByTypeAndGenreAndDateRange(ContentType type, String genreId, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds contents by type, genre, and release date range.
      Parameters:
      type - content type constant
      genreId - unique identifier of target genre
      startDate - starting release date limit
      endDate - ending release date limit
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByTitleSubstring

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByTitleSubstring(String substring)
      Finds contents by title substring.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment of content title
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByTitleAndTypeAndGenreAndDate

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByTitleAndTypeAndGenreAndDate(String substring, ContentType type, String genreId, String startDate, String endDate)
      Finds contents by title substring, type, genre, and release date range.
      Parameters:
      substring - name fragment of content title
      type - content type constant
      genreId - unique identifier of target genre
      startDate - starting release date range
      endDate - ending release date range
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByGenreAndDurationRange

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByGenreAndDurationRange(String genreId, int minDuration, int maxDuration)
      Finds contents of a specific genre with duration within a given range.
      Parameters:
      genreId - unique identifier of target genre
      minDuration - minimum runtime threshold in minutes
      maxDuration - maximum runtime threshold in minutes
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • findContentsByYearRange

      public Iterable<Content> findContentsByYearRange(int startYear, int endYear)
      Finds contents released within a year range.
      Parameters:
      startYear - starting year value (inclusive)
      endYear - ending year value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      matching content list

    • removeUser

      public void removeUser(User user)
      Removes a user from all search indexes.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to remove

    • removeArtist

      public void removeArtist(Artist artist)
      Removes an artist from all search indexes.
      Parameters:
      artist - the artist to remove

    • removeContent

      public void removeContent(Content content)
      Removes a content item from all search indexes.
      Parameters:
      content - the content to remove

    • rebuildIndexes

      public void rebuildIndexes(StreamingDatabase db)
      Fully rebuilds all indexes from the current database state.
      Parameters:
      db - the current database instance
